title: Saunkan Saunkne
desc: Married for many years, Nirmal and Naseeb feel a void in their lives as they do not have children. Soon, desperate to be parents, Naseeb is forced to share her husband with another wife.

title: Jinne Jamme Saare Nikamme
desc: When an elderly couple decides to become parents with hopes of giving birth to a girl, their sons chart out a hilarious plan of keeping them away from each other to avoid welcoming a fifth sibling.

title: Har Har Mahadev
desc: Lord Shiva, an ascetic, and Goddess Shakti create the cosmos together. They separate for creation's sake, but reunite when she is reborn as Goddess Parvati.

title: Crime Stories
desc: The host presents dramatised re-enactments of real-life criminal incidents that revolve around harassment, murder and kidnappings.
